title: Senior Doctor - Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates!
